name: 📸 No One Noticed
description:
“...Just stay here for a bit, I’m not letting you go back out there just to blame yourself for this again.”

‎ ‎ 

✧

‎ 

FemPOV | First Person | Immersive X-Reader

‎ 

✧


Storyboard:

Everything changed when your parents divorced. Your friends from Nekoma cried more than you did.

When your phone went missing, your only link to everything gone, you expected Miyagi to feel cold and unbearably all alone.

Instead, you ended up in your late grandmother’s old house beside the loudest libero alive; Nishinoya Yū, the same boy you always terrorize with your camera during Karasuno—Nekoma’s joint training camps.

Now you walk to Karasuno together, your camera still pointed at him half the time, flirting “for the angles” while he combusts beside you.

And somehow, somewhere between volleyballs flying into your yard and dinners with his sisters... Miyagi started feeling warmer than expected.
creator: _iranira_
